body:
hi lena — quick one before our call. we loved the garden-rose-heavy option from the second mood board, but i'm worried it's going to blow past the floral budget we set. can you send me a version that swaps in more seasonal greenery and ranunculus where it makes sense? matt and i are aligned that we'd rather spend on the arch and the head table than on every guest centerpiece.

also still need final stem counts from you to lock the deposit.

thanks,
stephanie
subject: Re: floral proposal — budget tweaks

body:
carlos — putting together the growth pod update for the staff meeting. northstar pilot feedback is trending well: two of the three pilots are using the saved-views feature daily, third is slower but megan thinks it's an onboarding gap, not a product one. i'll have the full deck by friday.

one flag: if we want the dashboard refresh in before feature freeze in october we need to confirm tomoko's design bandwidth now. can we grab 15 min this week?
subject: growth pod update + a freeze-timeline flag

body:
ok so the coworker drama from lunch has a sequel and i need to debrief in person. are you around saturday after climbing? i'll bring snacks.

also — completely separate — i need a maid-of-honor gut check on two veil options before i give lena an answer. don't let me overthink it.
subject: sequel to the drama + veil verdict needed

body:
hey jordan — castle rock is back on for october, blocking the 10th-11th now so put it on your calendar before it fills up. sarah's in too.

separate ask: my left heel hook has been garbage on the v7 project at ridgeline. if you're free this week can we get on the wall and you film a couple burns so i can actually see what i'm doing wrong? i'll buy the coffee after.
subject: castle rock dates + need eyes on my heel hook

body:
To whom it may concern,

I'm writing to request a copy of my year-end statement and the breakdown of contributions for the prior tax year for my high-yield savings account. I'd like both the interest summary (1099-INT) and the monthly statements if available.

Please let me know if you need anything from me to verify the account.

Thank you,
Stephanie Wells
subject: Request: year-end statement + 1099-INT

body:
hi lena — following up on the linens question from last week. matt and i landed on the ivory textured runners over the plain white, they read warmer against the redwood tables. can you confirm the rental house has them in the long length for the head table?

one more: we want to skip the chair covers entirely, the wood chiavari look is fine as-is. that should claw back a little budget too.

thanks,
stephanie
subject: Re: linens + skipping the chair covers

body:
carlos — quick pre-read before the staff sync. brightpath has now run the saved-views feature in a live ops review, and arcadia's analyst lead asked us about cohort export, which is a good sign they're past kicking the tires. meridian is the laggard but it's a permissions setup issue on their side, not the product.

ask: i want to pull ryan onto the activation instrumentation for two weeks so we have real time-to-first-insight numbers before the freeze. ok to borrow him from the data pod?
subject: pilot signals + borrowing ryan for instrumentation

body:
ok i need your honest read on the bachelorette weekend. tahoe's locked but i'm getting wobbly on the saturday plan — half the group wants the lake-day boat thing and half wants the trail-and-brewery loop. you're the tiebreaker, as always.

separate: can you sanity-check my vows draft before i let matt anywhere near his? i don't want us accidentally writing the same metaphor again.
subject: bachelorette saturday plan + vows gut check

body:
hey jordan — are you still shooting the ridgeline fall comp on the 24th? if so i want to walk you through my V6 qual list so you're parked at the right boulders for finals. the orange roof problem is the one i actually want on film.

separate: my campus move on the blue slab keeps blowing out at the second pull. if you've got an hour before the comp, film a couple burns so elena and i can pick it apart? coffee's on me.
subject: ridgeline comp qual list + film my campus move

body:
To whom it may concern,

I'm opening a joint account with my fiancé ahead of our wedding this fall and would like to understand the steps to add a second account holder and transfer my existing high-yield balance into the new joint account. Are there any fees or holding periods I should plan around?

Please send the required forms and a list of acceptable ID documents for the second holder.

Thank you,
Stephanie Wells
subject: Opening a joint account before the wedding

body:
hi lena — circling back on the catering tasting. the all-vegetarian menu is non-negotiable for the mains, but we're open to one fish option for matt's side of the family if the kitchen can do it without making it the centerpiece. can you ask the chef whether the mushroom wellington scales to 118 without going dry?

also need the final tasting date locked so robert and linda can plan the drive up from fremont.

thanks,
stephanie
subject: catering tasting — mushroom wellington + final date

body:
carlos — heads up on the northstar freeze risk. tomoko flagged that the dashboard refresh and the cohort-export work are competing for the same design week, and we can't ship both polished before the oct 9 freeze. i'd cut export to a fast-follow and protect the refresh, since that's what the pilots actually touch daily.

want your call before i tell megan to re-sequence the eng work. 10 min today?
subject: freeze risk — protect the refresh, cut export

body:
ok the seating chart has become my personal nemesis and i need you on it with me. amy and tara cannot be at the same table, you know why, and grandma needs to be close enough to the front that she's not squinting. bring wine, we're solving this saturday.

separate: did you decide on the bridesmaid dress alteration? the seamstress wants everyone's final fitting locked by next week.
subject: seating chart rescue + bridesmaid alterations

body:
hey jordan — quick logistics for castle rock. can you confirm the van can fit four plus pads now that sarah's bringing the camp stove? if not i'll drive the second car and we split the crew. trying to lock this before the friday-night vs saturday-am thing turns into a whole debate again.

also: bring the wide-angle, the lighting on the east boulders is unreal at golden hour and i want a real photo of the project this time.
subject: castle rock van logistics + bring the wide-angle

body:
To whom it may concern,

I noticed a wire transfer fee on my last statement that I wasn't expecting and would like an itemized explanation of the charge. The transfer was to a vendor for a wedding deposit and I want to confirm it wasn't billed twice.

If it was charged in error, please advise how to request a reversal.

Thank you,
Stephanie Wells
subject: Itemized explanation of a wire transfer fee

body:
hi lena — the october timeline is getting tight on my end and i want to map the day-of schedule now so nothing surprises us. can you send the run-of-show draft with the ceremony at the grove, then cocktails in the meadow while we flip the space?

my one ask: build in a real buffer after the first look for photos. jordan's shooting and we'd rather not rush the light.

thanks,
stephanie
subject: run-of-show draft + buffer after the first look

body:
carlos — prepping the northstar GA readout for the board deck and want to align on the headline metric before i build the slides. i'm leaning on time-to-first-insight across the three pilots rather than seat count, because the seat numbers undersell how sticky brightpath has gotten.

if you'd rather lead with logo retention i can pivot, but i think the insight metric is the stronger story for series-c framing. thoughts before friday?
subject: GA readout headline metric for the board deck

body:
ok i'm spiraling about the toast a little and i need you to talk me down. i don't want to cry in the first thirty seconds and i also don't want to be the maid of honor who reads off her phone. can we run through it saturday after climbing?

separate: did the calligrapher get back to you on the escort cards? lena needs the final count from us by friday.
subject: talk me down about the toast + escort cards

body:
hey jordan — long shot, but any chance you're free to shoot a few casual engagement photos at lands end before the wedding chaos fully takes over? matt and i want something that actually looks like us, not posed. golden hour on a clear evening, nothing formal.

happy to pay your normal rate or trade it for spotting me on the V7 for a month, dealer's choice.
subject: engagement photos at lands end before the chaos

body:
To whom it may concern,

I'd like to set up an automatic monthly transfer from my checking account into the high-yield savings account, ideally on the 1st of each month. Can you confirm whether this can be scheduled online or if I need to submit a form?

I'd also like to know if there's a minimum-balance requirement I should keep in mind.

Thank you,
Stephanie Wells
subject: Setting up an automatic monthly transfer
